title: Uruguayan Roasted Duck
description: A classic Uruguayan dish with a twist, featuring roasted duck with a crispy skin.
instructions: Rinse the duck and pat it dry with paper towels.
Season the duck with salt, pepper, and garlic.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck on all sides until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the duck to a roasting pan and roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Add the roasted vegetables and Uruguayan bitter to the roasting pan.
Continue roasting for another 20-25 minutes, or until the duck is cooked through and the skin is crispy.
Let the duck rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
